initialize.instructions: For ordinary user requests, call run with the user's natural-language request. Use analyze only when the user explicitly asks to inspect the plan before execution. Use validate_plan and run_plan when the MCP client chooses workflow stages.

serverInfo.description: Pure Go MCP server for Verdandi orchestration.
serverInfo.name: verdandi-mcp
serverInfo.title: Verdandi MCP Server

prompts.description: Choose Verdandi stages, validate the plan, then run it.
prompts.name: plan-and-run
prompts.title: Plan and Run

prompts.description: Create a client-selected Verdandi plan and validate it before execution.
prompts.name: validate-plan
prompts.title: Validate Plan

prompts.description: Inspect a previous Verdandi run through resources and status tools.
prompts.name: inspect-run
prompts.title: Inspect Run

arguments.description: The failed Verdandi runId to inspect.
arguments.name: runId

prompts.description: Analyze a failed Verdandi run and identify the failed stage and output.
prompts.name: inspect-failed-run
prompts.title: Inspect Failed Run

arguments.description: The next task request that needs an agent lifecycle decision.
arguments.name: request

prompts.description: Use agent metrics to choose reuse-enhance, rewrite, or separate for a future run.
prompts.name: choose-agent-lifecycle
prompts.title: Choose Agent Lifecycle

resourceTemplates.description: Read a single Verdandi run record by runId.
resourceTemplates.name: run
resourceTemplates.title: Verdandi Run

resourceTemplates.description: Read visualization events for a Verdandi run.
resourceTemplates.name: run-events
resourceTemplates.title: Verdandi Run Events

resourceTemplates.description: Read generated output file metadata for a Verdandi run.
resourceTemplates.name: run-output
resourceTemplates.title: Verdandi Run Output

resourceTemplates.description: Read a prepared workflow package by runId.
resourceTemplates.name: workflow
resourceTemplates.title: Verdandi Workflow

resourceTemplates.description: Read the Markdown handoff prompt for a prepared workflow.
resourceTemplates.name: workflow-handoff
resourceTemplates.title: Verdandi Workflow Handoff

resources.description: List persisted agent contracts and lifecycle recommendations.
resources.name: agents
resources.title: Verdandi Agents

resources.description: List persisted agent and skill assets.
resources.name: assets
resources.title: Verdandi Assets

tools.description: Default tool for natural-language task requests. It analyzes the request, creates the needed agent workflow, executes it, and returns the run summary.
tools.name: run
tools.title: Run Verdandi

tools.description: Analyze a natural-language request and return the selected agent contract without executing the workflow.
tools.name: analyze
tools.title: Analyze request

tools.description: Create or reuse persistent agent and skill assets, then return a workflow handoff package for the external LLM coding agent.
tools.name: prepare_workflow
tools.title: Prepare Verdandi workflow

tools.description: List existing reusable agent and skill assets relevant to a request.
tools.name: recommend_assets
tools.title: Recommend Verdandi assets

tools.description: Record success, failure, and lessons for a persistent agent or skill asset after an external coding agent uses it.
tools.name: record_outcome
tools.title: Record asset outcome

tools.description: Run an ordered Verdandi stage plan selected by the MCP client after Verdandi validates and normalizes it.
tools.name: run_plan
tools.title: Run client-selected plan

tools.description: Validate and normalize an ordered Verdandi stage plan without executing it.
tools.name: validate_plan
tools.title: Validate client-selected plan

tools.description: Look up a previous Verdandi run by runId.
tools.name: get_status
tools.title: Get run status

tools.description: List generated output files for a previous Verdandi run.
tools.name: open_output
tools.title: Open run output

tools.description: List persisted dynamic agent contracts and lifecycle policy options.
tools.name: list_agents
tools.title: List Verdandi agents

tools.description: List persisted skill assets and lifecycle status.
tools.name: list_skills
tools.title: List Verdandi skills
